violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off. Ice was in process of being voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice. Divider to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
